arrival.text: Pull a ticket when you enter. You must have this ticket in order to exit.

Look for Down Ramp into the parking structure. Park only in spaces with a RED "Airport and Visitor Parking" Sign. Please pull into the space only enough so that no other vehicle can park behind you. Take a photo to remember the section and floor parked on.
Take elevator to the lobby level and wait for shuttle in front of building off of Century Blvd. at the sidewalk. Please keep driveways clear.

departure.text: When you return to LAX, please stand at the curb under the red "Hotel & Courtesy Shuttles" sign at Ground Transportation on the Upper/Departures Level. Call 310-641-0706 to let them know you've arrived and to get a return shuttle time estimate.

common.title: Airport Spectrum LAX - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5757 W Century Blvd. This is the Airport Spectrum covered self-park garage. It is located on the north side of W Century Blvd. between Bellanca Ave. and Airport Blvd. You can only access this location traveling west on W Century Blvd. The garage entrance is underneath the 'Airport Spectrum' building signs, on the west end of the circle drive.
restrictions: Height restriction: 6' 2"

PLEASE NOTE: See the cashier for ticket and reservation verification before exiting the facility. The cashier is located on the lobby floor, out the doors across from the security desk that is in the lobby.
Shuttle Notice: Please allow up to 30 minutes for shuttle pickup and drop-off. Plan accordingly when traveling to the airport.

This facility does NOT allow in/out privileges. Using a parking reservation to exit on any day/time before the final date the parking reservation is over will change the status of the reservation to used and the same reservation will no longer be valid. The daily rate will apply once a reservation is used.

This facility’s equipment does not accept SpotHero reservation extensions. If you need any additional time beyond your original reservation time, you will need to pay the facility directly at their rate.

When you return to LAX, please stand at the curb under the red "Hotel & Courtesy Shuttles" sign at Ground Transportation on the Upper/Departures Level. Call 310-641-0706 to let them know you've arrived and to get a return shuttle time estimate.

Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device. The airport shuttle is located on the front drive of the hotel.
PLEASE NOTE: If this is a self-park/valet assist reservation, please show the valet attendant your reservation.  After doing so, park your vehicle in any "non-reserved" parking spot and head over to the shuttle bus.

The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit. Please allow an additional 30 minutes to park your vehicle and for the short shuttle bus ride to your departure terminal.

departure.text: When you return to LAX and pick up your luggage, please leave the baggage claim, turn right, and look for the red sign that reads 'Hotel Shuttles'. Look for a light blue shuttle that reads 'Servicing Sonestra LAX and Spectrum Parking.

When you're ready to go, show the valet your ticket and your car will be retrieved.

arrival.text:
Please do not swipe a credit card to enter the facility, instead please scan your reservation.
Upon entry, scan your reservation from your confirmation email and follow the on-screen instructions.

Proceed to find parking on levels 4 and above. Take the elevator down to level 1 and follow the signs to the shuttle service waiting area on the west side of the parking garage. Garage clearance is 6' 6". Please note, while covered parking is usually available, guests may be required to park on the rooftop of the parking garage during peak periods.
Board the shuttle and head to the airport.

departure.text: Upon Return - In compliance with airport regulations, pick-up for Airport Center Parking guests is on the upper level (departures).  Please head upstairs to the red sign for Hotel & Private Parking Shuttles located outside of Ticketing.  Text "shuttle" to (310) 439-5277 for airport pickup.

On exit, scan your reservation again and follow on-screen instructions. If you have stayed past your reservation end date/time, you will be required to pay the additional balance during check out at the posted rate(s) listed at the lot. There are no in-and-out privileges. Every time you enter the facility you will start a new stay.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: Airport Center Parking - Covered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: From I-405 North: Take Exit 46 toward LAX Airport/Century Blvd. Keep right at the fork, follow signs for Century Blvd W. Turn left at W. Century Blvd. We are on your right, just after Airport Blvd, next to the Sonesta. From I-405 South: Take the Century Blvd Exit. Turn left at La Cienega Blvd. Turn right onto Century Blvd. We are on your right, just after Airport Blvd, next to the Sonesta. From I-105 East: Take the Exit toward Sepulveda North/LAX. Turn right at 98th Street. We are on your right, next to the Sonesta.
restrictions: Additional parking spots are available on the exposed rooftop of the garage.

Airport Center Parking provides flexibility on arrival times. If you arrive before your reservation start time, tap the grey barcode to proceed with parking. You will only be charged additional if you exceed the total number of hours on your pre-paid reservation.
Height restriction: 6' 6"
Shuttle Notice: Please allow up to 30 minutes for shuttle pickup and drop-off. Plan accordingly when traveling to the airport.
THIS CONTRACT LIMITS OUR LIABILITY: https://airportcenterparking.net/terms-and-conditions/

Upon Return - In compliance with airport regulations, pick-up for Airport Center Parking guests is on the upper level (departures).  Please head upstairs to the red sign for Hotel & Private Parking Shuttles located outside of Ticketing.  Text "shuttle" to (310) 439-5277 for airport pickup.
Visa, MasterCard, Discover, American Express. Note: cash and checks are not accepted.

WARNING: Breathing the air in this parking garage can expose you to chemicals including carbon monoxide and gasoline or diesel engine exhaust, which are known to the State of California to cause cancer and birth defects or other reproductive harm. Do not stay in this area longer than necessary. For more information go to www.P65Warnings.ca.gov/parking.

Once outside look for the RED sign displaying "Hotel Shuttle and Private Parking shuttle pick-up". Call ahead prior to your arrival to schedule shuttle pick up time (310) 322-0700

 

 Guests can call, text, WhatsApp & WeChat. You can catch our shuttle the following way: Please proceed to the lower floor following the sign "luggage claim".
